description: Micron (MU) delivered one of the most dramatic AI-driven turnarounds in recent memory. description: On April 19, 2026, the Honor Lightning humanoid robot ran a half-marathon in 50 minutes and 26 seconds, beating the human world record by 7 minutes and the best robot time from 2025 by almost two hours.How did they do it? title: When Refusal Doesn’t Matter: Operation Epic Fury and the Erosion of Host Nation Consent
description: When the U.S. military launched its war against Iran in Feb. 2026, it did not just dismantle Iranian military capabilities. title: Jazz, AbCellera strike TCE discovery and development deal worth up to $820M per drug
